summary: Tested business day (jornada) logic implementation: auto-open on login, force logout on Cierre Z, blocking operations without active day. All backend tests passed (6/6). Frontend UI flows verified via Playwright.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for some dialogs - minor accessibility issue

seed_data_creation: Multiple business days created during testing: JT-0010, JT-0011, JT-0012, JT-0013
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business day logic fully implemented and working. Current open day: JT-0014 or higher. Cierre Z flow closes day and redirects to login. Next login auto-opens new day with toast message.

features_verified.backend_login_returns_business_day_opene: PASS - Returns true when new day opened, false when day already exists
features_verified.backend_login_auto_opens_day: PASS - Auto-opens new business day when none exists
features_verified.backend_current_day_endpoint: PASS - Returns has_open_day, business_day object with status/ref
features_verified.backend_close_returns_force_logout: PASS - Returns force_logout: true in close response
features_verified.frontend_cierre_z_dialog: PASS - Opens dialog with PIN input and CERRAR JORNADA button
features_verified.frontend_cierre_z_logout_redirect: PASS - After close, redirects to login screen
features_verified.frontend_toast_on_close: PASS - Shows 'Jornada cerrada. Se requiere nuevo login...' toast
features_verified.frontend_product_button_compact_desktop: PASS - Height 56px on desktop which is compact (not oversized)
features_verified.frontend_order_screen_day_check: VERIFIED - Code checks business-days/current on mount and blocks operations if !hasActiveDay
